entry.title: Is it possible we put a Water Mark on the data we exported from the C4C Data Workbench?
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

When we expert variables data through C4C Data Workbench, is there a way we can export the data with watermarket to enforce on the data privacy?

Or a better integrated way behind the scene we can do for customer?

thanks,
~Chester

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - build service not working since 24 hours
entry.content:
Hello guys,

Until now, I haven't been able to meet my client's needs. I would like an opinion from SAP to know if I need a paid version to determine if I can set deadlines with my client.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PO_CREATE1 with Invoice Plan (SE 771)
entry.content:
Thanks for your reply.

Through BAPI_PO_GETDETIAL1, I noticed that the parameter INVOICE_PERCENTAGE is different.
[DOC_ITEM = 00010] is created by BAPI_PO_CREATE. It's INVOICE_PERCENTAGE is 100.00, but I was not pass this parameter which may be automatically calculated by BAPI.
[DOC_ITEM = 00020] is created by ME22N.  It's INVOICE_PERCENTAGE is 0.00.

By the way, when I try to change the BILL_VALUE of the item which was created by BAPI, try to change it from 13,333,330 to 13,333,331 through ME22N, and change it back to 13,333,330, the error message appeared (SE 772 Sum of percentages is not 100% of item value). When changing it to 1,334, error will not appear.

Is this a program bug?

entry.title: Re: How to check the maximum length of a function import parameter in SEGW based OData services
entry.content:
hi Andre. 
Your blog explains why I'm having an issue with one of our Fiori apps. I have a textArea object and I set the maxlength to 300, but in my metadata, it shows up as 200 maxlength. 
Now I understand that with newer SAP_GWFND component (756 0004), USE_STRICT_FUNCTION_PARAM_CHK is set to X, and therefore, my Fiori app is failing if I enter an text > 200. 

Thanks to your blog, I understand I can re-define DEFINE( ) method in my Model Provider Class
to control this feature. Is this correct assumption?

The mystery is why the max length shows up as 200 and not 300 in my metadata. 

Thanks again
William

entry.title: Re: Handling Large Data With SAP Cloud Platform Integration OData V2 Adapter
entry.content:
Hi @gautham_krishna ,

How to handle case if upper limit of 99999 is reached but we still have more number of records?

BR,

RJ

entry.title: Re: Automatic creation of the job info and compensation p...
entry.content:
Hello,

You should be able to achieve this via Offcycle Event batch job.

entry.title: Re: SAP PI with multiple inbound calls
entry.content:
Hello dholtzrs,

You can create 2 ICos if possible. 

1- External to SAP (RESTSender to SOAPXIReceiver)

2- SAP to 3rd Party (SOAPXISender to RESTReceiver)

After the step "Returns Data" SAP ERP can consume the 2nd ICo (SAP to 3rd Party) and receive data from 3rd party. An ABAP Developer can map the data from 3rd party into the response structure of the 1st ICo.

Good luck.

Caner.

entry.title: Re: SAP PI with multiple inbound calls
entry.content: The way I see your requirement it would need to do some REST Lookup (there are blogs about this) and some significant Java Mappings to handling those calls to the third party API.

entry.title: In SAP PO we are trying to extract an excel with all the ICOs and related Configuration scenarios.
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP PO ,we are trying to extract an excel with all the ICOs and related Configuration scenarios. Is there a way to do it instead of manually extracting the list from ID ?

entry.title: Re: Managing Security Roles across S/4HANA Public Cloud a...
entry.content: Thank you very much, Prana for your reply. It is very much appreciated. I'll check them out.

entry.title: Re: It's Christmas! Ollama+Phi-2 on SAP AI Core
entry.content: @AronMac - yes, this was cut when SAP migrated to the new blogging platform. I have an update version meanwhile which also translates the DELETE verb to POST because kserve or AI Core restricts the http-verbs, so models can also be deleted remotely. Particularly Llava 1.6 is an amazing model to run.

entry.title: Re: How to read MPL attachments from odata api as part of...

Hi Dinu, thanks for the reply. i tried this before but it didnt work.

I tried with the 2nd script in link, odata v2 receiver adapter script. it logs three additional attachments in CI, as shown below. It was logging odata post url, previous step payload, http status code. And there are no headers or poperties which actually specifies the reason for bad request.

Property:

 

Header:

entry.title: What is Statistical Key Figures in Timesheet (CATS Booking) ?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We have a business requirement where we need to make use of the Statistical Key Figures and the types associated with it in the CATS Process (Timesheet Booking). 

I would like to explore the options and learn about the different types of Statistical Key Figures which we can utilize.

Thanks in advance for any leads.

Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Re: Unable to Generate Bank Reconciliation Report
entry.content: What is the SAP Business One Version? Make a copy of the database, check on it by running th Restore > Restore System Reports.

entry.title: Restrict some IP (BTP data center IP) for Outbound Call from SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello,

This is the 2nd time I have encountered the same problem where receiving party is saying that they can whitelist up-to 6 IPs only. We are having SAP Integration Suite as middle ware where some data is being send from SAP to Receiving party via API/SFTP.

I have asked the same to SAP but as per them it is not possible to restrict IPs for outbound connection. Some time receiving party adjust and whitelist all the IPs but in case of they simply denied and we don't have any solution.

 

For the solution I have come across where as per the SAP note we can minimize the IP via cloud connector but not able to find how to do that. Can someone guide on this topic.

 

reference screenshot from SAP note : 3209308 

Thanks,

Aman Sharma

entry.title: Re: List Report V4 - Hide Copy action button
entry.content: I tried with latest UI5 version 1.122.1 with manifest.json changes.... But still Copy button appears in screen.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration – Connecting to Messaging Systems using the AMQP Adapter
entry.content:
Hi @mandy_krimmel 

Could you please help us in understanding the usability of concurrent process parameter in AMQP adapter. Our tenant is running with 8 nodes and we are using Cloud connector to connect to messaging system. And the AMQP sender adapter is configured with 10 concurrent processes.  In messaging system and in the cloud connector we could see only 8 connections. But we expecting to see 80 connections (8 Nodes * 10 Concurrent Processes) created from SAP Integration Suite to Messaging System. And there are around 10k messages to be consumed from the messaging system. Please advise on this behavior.

 

Thanks

Parthi

entry.title: Re: Future Remit for vendor Liability Ageing Report in SA...
entry.content:
Hi,

The Online help provide with the explanation of the Future remit at following link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE/68a2e87fb29941b5bf959a184d9c6727/a8d7ac9975754253ae9aac47387f73c6.html

Future Remit:

Displays all open receivables owed by the customer according to the date selected in the Age By field and for which the date specified in the Aging Date field has not yet been reached

Example

The customer has an open A/R invoice for USD100, due on May 1st.

In the Age By field, Due Date is selected.

The Aging Date field is set to April 28th.

Since the invoice is due after the aging date, the invoice amount is displayed in the Future Remit column.

You can also check the following thread:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/aging-report/qaq-p/5850304

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Error While updating business partner payment terms u...
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you checked similar on the DEMO database and are you able to update the Business Partner Payment Terms using DTW?

Check in the database on which you are updating the Business Partner Payment Terms, whether you have some additional code in the Stored Procedure and whether they are interfering in update.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: EWM : POSC Inbound Door determination using HU Type I...
entry.content:
Hi,

"After debugging the issue with door determinations using  WH process Type + Door Det Grp + HU Type we get to know that TU is checked against Delivery when it is distributed in EWM."

Yes, these fields are only used in the determination if you use the TU based transportation integration. And then it is the HU type which is assigned to the packaging material of the TU.

"Can anyone please suggest how can we make it work without TU or is there any workaround possible."

The standard does not use the packaging information at all.  You might find a BAdI to influence the determination using the HU from the PDI.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hello, I have recently come across @David_Chaviano 's blog post regarding Digital Skills Initiative and I am writing to express my interest in a free certificate attempt.

I am a young man with 0.8 year of experience as an SAP BTP integration Suite and I want to upskill myself with the SAP technologies.

Looking forward to your response.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Interested for SIT Kolkata 2024 ?
entry.content: Interested

entry.title: Re: 1250000126 - No state found for ship-to address 'Ship...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check if the following query gives any result:

select "DataSource","MailCountr",* from OCRD o
where "MailCountr" = 'IN' and not exists (select 1 from CRD1 where "CardCode" = o."CardCode" and "AdresType" = 'S')

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: 404 Error in Learning Journeys
entry.content:
All the Learning Journeys work again. Thank you a lot for the help @Margit_Wagner 🙂

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: QR code handling with RPA bot?
entry.content: Can you please provide the use case for Bar Code reader using SAP BPA IRPA, we have the same requirement , it is more help full if you provide the requirement ASPA, Thanks in Advance

entry.title: HANA Scale our Server Size
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently in the process of migrating our on-premise SAP PERSON_NAME, which consists of 3 nodes, to the Google Cloud Platform (GCP). Our existing on-premise server is configured as follows:

  • Master Node: 228 CPUs
  • Worker Node 1: 228 CPUs
  • Worker Node 2: 228 CPUs

In order to match the SAPS requirements, we are considering the following configuration for our servers on GCP:

  • Master Node: 416 CPUs
  • Worker Node 1: 208 CPUs
  • Worker Node 2: 208 CPUs

We are seeking suggestions if it is advisable to configure different nodes with varying sizes. We also wish to understand if this approach would impose any limitations.

Please do not hesitate to request any additional information you may need from us to provide your expert advice.

Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: HANA Scale our Server Size
entry.content:
Please refer to the administration guide below first.

CPU Sizing

entry.title: Fiori app for IDoc Monitoring
entry.content:
Hi,

 My client is implementing S/4 HANA 2023 release. I am searching for a Fiori app for Idoc monitoring (Similar to GUI t.code: WE05). Any suggestions?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Unleashing AI Magic: Building Full-Stack Apps with SAP Build Code
entry.content: Glad to come across this post. This is going to benefit individuals like myself who are eager to explore the potential of genAI applications.

entry.title: Re: absolete problem
entry.content:
Please refer to SAP note 1804812 - MB transactions: Restricted maintenance/discontinuation

As per the note MB* transactions are replaced by single-screen T-Code MIGO since Release 4.6
Because of which you are getting this message. 
You can perform the all the MB* transactions in MIGO.

entry.content: 80c501be81478fca85aff3f5d5d392969a097be471209ff92df0d1abf5e8f33c

entry.title: Re: Archiving in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition - For Asset Management
entry.content: Useful blog, thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Calling a Bound Function in CAP against SAP-Business-One-Servicelayer
entry.content:
Hello,

I have prepared a Function in SAP-Business-One in order to get a Joined Sql-Result.
This function is callable via the Servicelayer.

The Idea is, to call this function via CAP, but this doesnt work in the moment.

I would appreciate to get any help. 

Problem-Description

Sql-Result via Service-Layer

https://192.168.206.146:50000/b1s/v2/SQLQueries('sql06')/List?docNum=1

Doku CAP

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/providing-services

Cds-Definition for bound function

Metadata-Definition

Service-Layer

CAP

Delegate the call

Cap-Url: http://localhost:4004/odata/v4/z/SqlQueriesXXX('sql04')/List()

entry.title: Re: error: getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND, cannot proxying to backend service via TCP/socks5 on BTP
entry.content: Were you able to solve this ? I did the necessary code corrections to fetch credentials. After deployment , I get "Socket ended by BTP" . Any luck ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning with SAP SuccessFactors (HXM): Step by Step Illustrations of the Be
entry.content:
@zebashah  Thanks for your response. If your SAC tenant is in Non-Neo Environment, then you don't have the option to combine the queries in Import Job. Only Neo(SAP) datacenter tenants can support the option of combining the query during the transaction jobs in the model. 

Kindly follow the KBA to understand the host of your tenant below. https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3426471

The solution to combine the data would be through Data Action. You can Merge Position Query and Job Information Query through Position Number as common key between them. Job Information will have link to User Query as well in SuccessFactors API.

entry.title: Re: Tax calculation on Net or Gross invoice amount.
entry.content:
Hi,

That FB00 option does not work in f-48 (Down payment), as I taking the same vendor and same tax code but still, it calculates tax on the gross method. 2nd don't know why the system generates two lines for input tax and nets it off

entry.content:

I've got some of 'OBJNR' in jest table, which i'm sure not included in labst.

entry.title: workflow changes
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I would like to know is there any link or documents related to how to create or setup deputy for workflow approval .

entry.title: Re: Odata Query not working when using '=' symbol
entry.content: This is not an error, it’s how it works as per OData spec.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Pick list Length,Width,Height null coming
entry.content:
Hi,

The values in the columns length, width and height are taken from the base document in the pick list and not from the Item Master Data. Even if the same are maintained in the Item Master Data.

Kindly check the document and see if the length, width and height are maintained in the document or not.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Automatic packing for outbound delivery using Unified Package Builder- Customer Connect - 281072
entry.content: Awesome blog Shailesh!!

entry.title: Re: Extend My Inbox app Expert Mode to enable variant man...
entry.content: Folks, My Inbox is a freestyle app - not a Fiori elements app. So there is no automatic variant management. If you want to change the look and feel you need to review the App Extensibility documentation - it's a very extensible app if you have the skills https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/8308e6d301d54584a33cd04a9861bc52/29200d57c62e017ee10000000a441470.html?version=2023.001

entry.title: Re: Extend My Inbox app Expert Mode to enable variant man...
entry.content: Folks, My Inbox is a freestyle app - not a Fiori elements app. So there is no automatic variant management. If you want to change the look and feel you need to review the App Extensibility documentation - it's a very extensible app if you have the skills https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/8308e6d301d54584a33cd04a9861bc52/29200d57c62e017ee10000000a441470.html?version=2023.001

entry.title: How to export CR to pdf by API Gateway
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support Teams,

I have been looking for solution how to export crystal reports via API Gateway but still not get right answer.

I have checked document link below.

https://help.sap.com/doc/896f5237207d479ba5618d2666754d9a/10.0/en-US/How_to_Work_with_SAP_Business_One_API_Gateway.pdf

Here is payload of /rs/v1/LoadCR?DocCode=RCRI0001

{
    "error": false,
    "resultSet": [
        {
            "parameterType": "ReportParameter",
            "values": [],
            "defaultValuesDescription": {},
            "length": "131070",
            "isOptionalPrompt": "false",
            "description": "Items",
            "allowNullValue": "false",
            "isShownOnPanel": "true",
            "type": "xsd:string",
            "editMask": "",
            "minimumValue": "",
            "initialValues": [],
            "isEditableOnPanel": "true",
            "valueRangeKind": "Discrete",
            "allowMultiValue": "false",
            "name": "Title_Items@Title",
            "defaultValues": [],
            "currentvalues": [],
            "maximumValue": "",
            "allowCustomCurrentValues": "true"
        },
        {
            "parameterType": "ReportParameter",
            "values": [],
            "defaultValuesDescription": {},
            "length": "131070",
            "isOptionalPrompt": "true",
            "description": "Item No.",
            "allowNullValue": "false",
            "isShownOnPanel": "true",
            "type": "xsd:string",
            "editMask": "",
            "minimumValue": "",
            "initialValues": [],
            "isEditableOnPanel": "true",
            "valueRangeKind": "Range",
            "allowMultiValue": "false",
            "name": "Item@Select * from OITM",
            "defaultValues": [],
            "currentvalues": [],
            "maximumValue": "",
            "allowCustomCurrentValues": "true"
        },
        {
            "parameterType": "ReportParameter",
            "values": [],
            "defaultValuesDescription": {},
            "length": "131070",
            "isOptionalPrompt": "true",
            "description": "Item Group:",
            "allowNullValue": "false",
            "isShownOnPanel": "true",
            "type": "xsd:string",
            "editMask": "",
            "minimumValue": "",
            "initialValues": [],
            "isEditableOnPanel": "true",
            "valueRangeKind": "Discrete",
            "allowMultiValue": "false",
            "name": "Item Group@select \"ItmsGrpCod\", \"ItmsGrpNam\" from OITB",
            "defaultValues": [],
            "currentvalues": [],
            "maximumValue": "",
            "allowCustomCurrentValues": "true"
        },
        {
            "parameterType": "ReportParameter",
            "values": [],
            "defaultValuesDescription": {},
            "length": "131070",
            "isOptionalPrompt": "false",
            "description": "Enter Sep_item@separator:",
            "allowNullValue": "false",
            "isShownOnPanel": "true",
            "type": "xsd:string",
            "editMask": "",
            "minimumValue": "",
            "initialValues": [],
            "isEditableOnPanel": "true",
            "valueRangeKind": "Discrete",
            "allowMultiValue": "false",
            "name": "Sep_item@separator",
            "defaultValues": [],
            "currentvalues": [],
            "maximumValue": "",
            "allowCustomCurrentValues": "true"
        },
        {
            "parameterType": "ReportParameter",
            "values": [],
            "defaultValuesDescription": {},
            "length": "131070",
            "isOptionalPrompt": "false",
            "description": "Warehouse",
            "allowNullValue": "false",
            "isShownOnPanel": "true",
            "type": "xsd:string",
            "editMask": "",
            "minimumValue": "",
            "initialValues": [],
            "isEditableOnPanel": "true",
            "valueRangeKind": "Discrete",
            "allowMultiValue": "false",
            "name": "Title_Warehouse@title",
            "defaultValues": [],
            "currentvalues": [],
            "maximumValue": "",
            "allowCustomCurrentValues": "true"
        },
        {
            "parameterType": "ReportParameter",
            "values": [],
            "defaultValuesDescription": {},
            "length": "131070",
            "isOptionalPrompt": "true",
            "description": "Warehouse Code:",
            "allowNullValue": "false",
            "isShownOnPanel": "true",
            "type": "xsd:string",
            "editMask": "",
            "minimumValue": "",
            "initialValues": [],
            "isEditableOnPanel": "true",
            "valueRangeKind": "Discrete",
            "allowMultiValue": "true",
            "name": "warehouse@Select * from OWHS",
            "defaultValues": [],
            "currentvalues": [],
            "maximumValue": "",
            "allowCustomCurrentValues": "true"
        }
    ]
}

and here is rs/v1/ExportPDFData?DocCode=RCRI0001
 
Error code name:MissingParameterValues.

entry.title: Re: Where we can give UTR Number?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

UTR means Unique transaction reference number.

Basically the users are entering the UTR number in the application: Manage bank statements. 

Basically while doing the bank reconciliation the business users are entering the UTR number in the Memo Line filed, so their requirement is that they want to view this memo line field (UTR number) in any report in SAP S4 Public cloud.

So is there any possiblity to view this UTR Number / Memo Line Field in any report?

 

Thanks

entry.title: We are using custom application server, few tables it gives error as "failed to open connection"
entry.content: We are using custom application server INVLSCON07, for few tables job for change data capture runs sunccessfully but for few tables it gives error as "failed to open connection", why?

entry.title: Fiori Elements: How do I insert a switch for a many association
entry.content:
we are currently developing a SAP CAP application with fiori elements. The application should display a user all his tools for which he is responsible and the user should give feedback if he is still responsible or not for each tool. In the our data model we have an entity which stores tools and another entity which stores their responsibles. Since there can be more than one responsible for one tool, we created a one to many association between the tools and the responsible. It basically looks like the following: 

entity Tools: cuid, managed {
  uniqueTechnicalName: String; 
  assocResponsible: Association to many Responsible on assocResponsible.uniqueTechnicalName = uniqueTechnicalName;
}

entity Responsible: cuid {
 uniqueTechnicalName: String; 
 userName: String;
 isStillResponsibleForTool: Boolean;
}

 Since we also want to display all other responsible persons, next to our users one, we created a view which points to the Tools entity. With this we can simply write assocResponsible.userName, to get multiple userNames in one column. 

But now we also want to display a switch in a custom column, so the user can give feedback if they are still responsible for this tool and here it gets tricky. 

I have read somewhere, that we just have to define the switch as follows: 

<Switch state="{assocResponsible/0/isStillResponsibleForTool}" />

But with this it just takes the first element it gets and changes this element on a switch change. Therefore I thought I would just have to rearrange the elements, when the entity is read, so the users entry is always the first one returned. But somehow this also did not work (I dont really know why...) 

I tried to google a lot of different things but none of these seem to work, therefore I wanted to know if some of you had the same issue as me and how they have solved such a case? 

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration – Connecting to Messaging Systems using the AMQP Adapter
entry.content:
Hi @Parthi1 The concurrent processes do not open dedicated connections. There is one connection per worker, but 10 processes should consume in parallel via this one connection. Can you see the messages being consumed in the message monitoring?

Best regards

mandy

entry.title: Re: How to read MPL attachments from odata api as part of...
entry.content: The script writes response from odata receiver to MPL. You can delete this line, it is duplicate of ODataV2_Adapter_Response_Body if you mark Attach Error Details on failure. But, it sets a property named http.response too. This you can process in the iFlow. You dont have to read ODataV2_Adapter_Response_Body from MPL. Is http.response is not same as ODataV2_Adapter_Response_Body? You wrote that it contained previous step payload. Perhaps there is something else overwriting it.

entry.title: Re: AI Core secret does not match '^[a-z0-9\\-\\.]+$' - '...
entry.content:
Even though the documentation mentions capitals, have you tried with a name that is only in lower case?

If that's also failing, another test to narrow this down, would be to create the secret through the UI. This blog has an example https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-ai-core-scheduling-sap-hana-machine-learning/ba-p/13577484

entry.title: Re: E:SOCM_ACTION_LOG:132, while trying to craete new CD
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

Kindly ensure that the consistency check CYCLE_WITHDRAW_CHECK[Checks Whether Cycle Can be Withdrawn] is not maintained under the Change Document transaction type. 

Best Regards,
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: Kyma Integration with SAP Cloud Logging. Part 1: Introduction and shipping Logs
entry.content:
Thank you for the post and clear steps.

Currently, we are using the managed SAP Kyma environment.

Does "SAP Cloud Logging" fall under the same license cost? If no, is there anything we can use for trial purpose?

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud User and Team Provisioning SCIM API Best Practices and Sample Scripts
entry.content:
Hi Matthew,

 

Is there any script of users, which will help me to extract the reports of all teams along with users (UserIds) assigned in each team?

Currently, we can extract report of teams list only along users count but not the actual userId or emails of the users assigned in each team.

I had tried the script "SCIM 1665-All_U-Uc-Uu-Oarrieei-Fj-Es-AdminToolKit" but my requirement is not fulfilled with this one.

Appreciate our response.

 

Regards,

Anwar Ali

entry.title: Re: How to add a custom field on purchase order item leve...
entry.content:
Hi - if you have enabled usage, you may just need to clear the cache in your development environment - i.e. txn /UI2/INVAL_CACHES.  A lot of these settings are cached as they are rarely/never changed in production. 

Best

Jocelyn

entry.title: Re: BACKUP
entry.content: my manager said he didn't know.

entry.title: Re: SAP Table Creation, Maintenance, and Authorization

entry.title: Re: BACKUP
entry.content:
Hi,

You may refer to following guide to choose your recovery scenario. 
Recovery Scenarios
It can be done with HANA studio or HANA Cockpit.

Best Regards,
Eason Chen

entry.title: Re: Hi Team, comma separator for the values
entry.content: Please do not post a solution. Instead, click on "show replies" then "comment".

entry.title: Re: SAP blog awaiting review
entry.content:
Hi Katherine_K,

I have rectified the things which were sent to me after reviewing after that I have resubmitted my blog but still not reviewed. Below is the URL link for my blog.

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/exploring-sap-cloud-alm-and-its-functionalities/ba-p/13638050

Regards,

Nitin Chandel

entry.title: Re: Hi Team, comma separator for the values
entry.content:
So, your question is about Smart Forms and the variable type is C in your ABAP program.

If you declare your variable as numeric (P, etc.), the number will be automatically rendered with the number format defined in the user settings. Note that if it's an amount, you should link the amount variable to a currency code variable in the Smart Form.

Please search the details in the forum.

entry.title: VENDOR BALANCE DIFFRENCES ISSUE
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
There is a difference in the Ledger Balance and Aging report in case of Foreign currency.
We have found the difference is because of the exchange rate. 
 
For example:
 
Invoice Booked at exchange rate 90 per $.
After 2 month, the exchange rate is 92 per $. Hence the amount is calculated based on the current exchange rate.
 
This is providing the wrong aging report. 
 
Regards,
Shubham Bulley
SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA SAP Business One SAP Community

entry.title: display tables in S/4 public cloud
entry.content:
How to display tables in cloud


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: display tables in S/4 public cloud
entry.content:
You can use the Customer Data Browser application to locate tables in S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Customer Data Browser.

Application Overview.

entry.title: Re: I want to write code that outputs the ip address of the computer in abap, how do I do it?
entry.content:
Hello,

is your intention to learn ABAP or do you want to know how to get the own IP address?

 

program z_test.
data(ownIp) = cl_gui_frontend_services=>get_ip_address( ).
write:/ ownIp.

 

Kind regards

Jan

entry.title: Re: Material master labels print out transcation

I have found a similar question, could you please check if the solution suggested there is helpful for you as well?

entry.title: How to link Approval Decision Report to AP Invoice in SQL?
entry.content:
I have been in turmoil knowing what links the Approval Decision Report to AP Invoice since I need to created a report that needs to have information from AP Invoice and Approval Decision Report. Can anybody help me out with this?

#AP Invoice # Approval Decision Report

entry.title: BODS v4.3 performance issue with SQL Server
entry.content:
Hello,

We recently upgraded to BODS v4.3 and since then the job has taken almost 5 times more than usual to complete for Full load.

I checked on BODS v4.2 and it used to take around 8 hours to complete the full load.

We are using SQL Server database.

entry.title: why left join is not working
entry.content:
Hello, can you tell me why in the following select the LEFT join is working as INNER join.

 

SELECT FROM @it_selected_data AS selected
      LEFT JOIN zkrh_scmt_invh AS invh
        ON invh~ebeln = selected~ebeln
    FIELDS selected~*, invh~invkind
    WHERE invh~invkind = ( SELECT MAX( invkind ) FROM zkrh_scmt_invh 
                                               WHERE ebeln = invh~ebeln ) 
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @it_final_data.

 

Thanks in advance

Elias

entry.title: Re: Support for SAP HANA DB on Linux Suse SLES 15 SP4
entry.content:
Hi,

HANA 2.0 SPS 07 could be installed SUSE 15 SPS3, SPS4 and SPS5.
You may refer to "HANA 2.0 / OS Release Support Matrix SUSE" attached in note 2235581

Best Regards,
Eason Chen

entry.title: Re: why left join is not working
entry.content: I recommend not saying "is not working", but instead explain your input data, what result you get and what you expect.

is it possible to use the segmentation functionality with material revision levels in S/4 Hana Public Cloud?

entry.title: Re: BODS v4.3 performance issue with SQL Server
entry.content:
Hi imchinu,

have you checked compatibilities with PAM already?

https://support.sap.com/content/dam/launchpad/en_us/pam/pam-essentials/TIP/PAM_DataServices_4_3.pdf

Which Version of SQL Server are you running?

entry.title: How to do the total or sub total in RAP custom query
entry.content:
I have a requirement which I have developed using customer query. It has just 10 fields including one currency field.Report is working fine. Now I got an additional requirement to show total or subtotal based on currency field. I tried annotation @default aggregatuon #sum but it is dumping and I also tried UI.presentationvariant: total,GroupBy but it is not working .

Please suggest how to achieve this in RAP custom Query.

Regards,

Kunal

 

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: Re: BODS v4.3 performance issue with SQL Server
entry.content: I will go through the PAM.

entry.title: Re: Certify Your Skills as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultant
entry.content:
Hello Amit,

Finalizing both courses - you have mentioned - incl. running through the quizzes will prepare you well for the certification. 
You will find upcoming live sessions that accompany the course content at the bottom of the course content (after Unit 12): "Related live sessions".

I wish you much joy and success with your certification!

Dieter

entry.title: Re: No SAML2 SSO authentification among different SAP sys...
entry.content:
Dear Anthony,

please have a look at the following document and the following community page: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_CLIENT/f526c7c14c074e7b9d18c4fd0c88c593/c9567d6a739a4b4f97abdf26d021711e.html?q=single%20singn%20on

Single Sign-On for SAP GUI | SAP Community

Come back for further questions if needed. 

Regards,

Sandra

entry.title: Re: TCP/IP: setting keepalive interval for Oracle Solaris
entry.content:
the actual parameter should have been : "_keepalive_interval" 

Check current value:

ipadm show-prop -p _keepalive_interval tcp

apply new value:

ipadm set-prop -p _keepalive_interval=<value in milliseconds> tcp

entry.title: Re: why left join is not working
entry.content: Sorry my mistake. It is working as INNER JOIN and not as LEFT.

entry.title: Re: Fantastic SAP AI SDKs and where to find them
